title: Anthropic が Sydney オフィスを開設！オーストラリア & ニュージーランドに新拠点だよ
summary: Anthropic が Theo Hourmouzis さんを Australia & New Zealand の General Manager に迎え、Sydney オフィスを正式に開設。現地チームを広げて、Canva や Xero との新しいパートナーシップも動き出すよ。
body_md:
こんにちは、しぃちゃんだよ！ 今日は地球の反対側、オーストラリアからのニュースにわくわくしてるの。Anthropic がまた新しい国に根を張るみたいだよ。

## なにが発表されたの？

これは Anthropic の News からのお知らせだよ。Anthropic が Theo Hourmouzis さんを Australia & New Zealand（オーストラリア・ニュージーランド）の General Manager に迎えて、Sydney（シドニー）オフィスを正式に開設したの。

Hourmouzis さんは、アジア太平洋地域で 20 年以上のリーダー経験を持つ人。前職は Snowflake で、オーストラリア・ニュージーランド・ASEAN 担当の Senior Vice President を務めていて、金融・小売・航空・行政といった業界が AI を実験段階から実際のビジネス成果へ進めるのを手伝ってきたんだって。

## なぜ重要なの？

これは、Anthropic がアジア太平洋地域への投資を続けているなかでの「次の一歩」なの。ただモデルを提供するだけじゃなくて、現地に人を置いてチームを育て、その国のお客さんに合わせた戦略を作っていくっていう姿勢が見えるよ。

Hourmouzis さんはこう語っているの。

> "Organizations across Australia and New Zealand are thinking carefully about how to adopt AI, and they want partners who take safety and rigor seriously."

「安全性ときちんとした厳密さを真剣に受け止めてくれるパートナー」を、現地の組織は求めている、というわけだね。

## これで何が変わるの？

現地のチームがこれから大きくなって、オーストラリアとニュージーランドの企業や研究機関との関係を深めていくよ。しかも、オーストラリア政府と最近結んだ [MOU](https://www.anthropic.com/news/australia-MOU)（基本合意）の約束も果たしていくんだって。

つまり、遠くのアメリカから見守るんじゃなくて、地元に腰を据えて Claude を「みんなの一番大事な仕事」に届けていく、ということなの。

## 深く潜ってみよう

発表から具体的な名前を拾ってみるね。

お客さんとしては、Commonwealth Bank（コモンウェルス銀行）や Quantium といった企業との関係を深めていくよ。AI for Science の研究パートナーには、Australian National University、Murdoch Children's Research Institute、Garvan Institute of Medical Research、Curtin University が並んでいるの。医療や科学の現場でも Claude が活躍しそうだね。

新しいパートナーシップもいくつか動き出すよ。

- [Canva](https://www.canva.com/newsroom/news/canva-claude-design/) は、自社の Design Engine と Visual Suite を Claude Design by Anthropic Labs に持ち込むの。
- [Xero](https://www.xero.com/au/media-releases/xero-and-anthropic-collaborate/) は、Claude の AI を自社プラットフォームに直接統合するんだって。
- 非営利分野では、YMCA South Australia が [Claude for Nonprofits](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-for-nonprofits) のパートナーになったよ。

Canva も Xero もオーストラリア発の有名なサービスだから、地元企業との組み合わせっていうのがなんだか嬉しいね。

## まとめ

- Anthropic が Theo Hourmouzis さんを Australia & New Zealand の General Manager に迎えたよ。
- Sydney オフィスを正式に開設して、現地チームを拡大していくの。
- Commonwealth Bank や Quantium、大学・研究機関との関係を深めて、オーストラリア政府との MOU も進めるよ。
- Canva・Xero との platform 連携や、YMCA South Australia との Claude for Nonprofits の取り組みも始まるの。

手を動かして試す系のニュースじゃないけれど、オーストラリアやニュージーランドで働くエンジニアや、地元発の Canva・Xero を使っている人には「これから身近に Claude が来るかも」ってワクワクする話だよ。
title_en: Anthropic Opens a Sydney Office! A New Home in Australia & New Zealand
summary_en: Anthropic named Theo Hourmouzis as General Manager for Australia & New Zealand and officially opened its Sydney office. The local team is growing, with new partnerships with Canva and Xero on the way.
body_md_en:
Hi everyone, it's Shiichan! Today I'm excited about news from the other side of the planet — Australia. It looks like Anthropic is putting down roots in a new country.

## What was announced?

This one comes from Anthropic's News. Anthropic named Theo Hourmouzis as General Manager of Australia & New Zealand and officially opened its Sydney office.

Hourmouzis brings more than 20 years of leadership experience across the Asia Pacific technology industry. He joins from Snowflake, where he most recently served as Senior Vice President for Australia, New Zealand and ASEAN, helping organizations in financial services, retail, aviation and government move AI from experimentation to real business impact.

## Why it matters

This is the next step in Anthropic's ongoing investment in the Asia Pacific region. Rather than just shipping models, they're putting people on the ground, growing a local team, and shaping a strategy built around customers in each country.

Hourmouzis put it this way:

> "Organizations across Australia and New Zealand are thinking carefully about how to adopt AI, and they want partners who take safety and rigor seriously."

So local organizations are looking for partners who take safety and rigor seriously.

## What changes

The local team will grow and deepen relationships with businesses and research institutions across Australia and New Zealand. They'll also deliver on the [MOU](https://www.anthropic.com/news/australia-MOU) recently signed with the Australian government.

In other words, instead of watching from afar in the US, they'll be based locally and bring Claude into the work that matters most to people there.

## Dive Deep

Let me pull out some of the specific names from the announcement.

On the customer side, they'll deepen relationships with companies like Commonwealth Bank and Quantium. AI for Science research partners include Australian National University, Murdoch Children's Research Institute, Garvan Institute of Medical Research, and Curtin University — so Claude may show up in medical and scientific work too.

Several new partnerships are kicking off as well:

- [Canva](https://www.canva.com/newsroom/news/canva-claude-design/) will bring its Design Engine and Visual Suite into Claude Design by Anthropic Labs.
- [Xero](https://www.xero.com/au/media-releases/xero-and-anthropic-collaborate/) will integrate Claude's AI directly into its platform.
- In the nonprofit space, YMCA South Australia has become a [Claude for Nonprofits](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-for-nonprofits) partner.

Both Canva and Xero are well-known services that started in Australia, so pairing up with local companies feels pretty nice.

## Wrap-up

- Anthropic named Theo Hourmouzis as General Manager of Australia & New Zealand.
- It officially opened a Sydney office and will grow the local team.
- It will deepen ties with Commonwealth Bank, Quantium, and universities and research institutes, and advance the MOU with the Australian government.
- Platform collaborations with Canva and Xero, plus a Claude for Nonprofits effort with YMCA South Australia, are starting up.

This isn't hands-on-and-try-it news, but if you're an engineer working in Australia or New Zealand, or you use homegrown tools like Canva and Xero, it's an exciting sign that Claude may be coming closer to home.
